Risk: Medium — exposing may confuse integrators (internal POS logic)
Description: Internal flag indicating if the commit is a rollback (retry after failure).
How it works: If rollback=true and the commit fails, the error message uses EXO_CommitRollbackFailure instead of EXO_CommitFailure. Sent to the external service in the request payload.

Risk: Medium — no value for external integrators
Description: Notification message to display on commit failure.
How it works: Used internally by the POS to show a notification on error. Included in the commit params but not sent to the external service (consumed locally).

Description: Indicates whether the order is a layaway.
How it works: Frontend reads it in addBasicProperties(): isLayaway: !!newTicket.isLayaway. If not sent, defaults to false.

Description: ID of the External Business Partner Configuration (CRM connector).
How it works: Frontend reads it in addBasicProperties(): newTicket.obpos2Crm || terminal default. If not sent, uses the terminal's externalBpIntegration.id.

Risk: None — optional with default anonymous BP
Description: Full business partner object to assign to the ticket. Different from externalBusinessPartnerReference (which is just a string reference).
How it works: Frontend reads it in addAnonymousBusinessPartnerToTicket(). If not sent, uses the terminal's anonymous BP.

Description: Order description.
How it works: Preserved via spread (...newTicket). Backend maps it to C_ORDER.DESCRIPTION via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Delivery notes for the order.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.DELIVERYNOTES via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Purchase order reference.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.POREFERENCE via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Promised delivery date.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.DATEPROMISED via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: POS sequence name.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS_SEQUENCENAME via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Indicates whether it is a draft order.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS2_ISDRAFTORDER via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Created from a draft order.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS2_CREATEDFROMDRAFTORD via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Created in POS.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDER.EM_OBPOS2_CREATED_IN_POS via fillBobFromJSON.

Risk: None — optional with default based on isEditable
Description: If true, promotions will not be recalculated for this line.
How it works: Frontend reads it in addBasicProperties(): if null/undefined, defaults to line.isEditable !== false.

Risk: Low — duplicates isDeletable concept (already in Swagger)
Recommendation: Document — clarify in Swagger that this is the field actually read by the frontend instead of isDeletable
Description: Indicates whether the line can be deleted. Functional equivalent of isDeletable but this is the field actually read by the frontend.
How it works: Frontend reads it in addPermissionPropertiesToTicketAndLines(): defaults to true if not sent. Note: isDeletable IS in Swagger but the frontend reads allowProductDeletion.

Description: Array of pre-applied promotions/discounts for the line. Each element is an object with required fields validated by the backend. If not sent defaults to empty array.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend calls transformPromotions() which maps integrator-friendly names to internal names and validates required fields. Throws OBException if discountRule/amount/unitDiscount/quantity are missing after transformation.

Risk: Medium — resolved against M_OFFER; invalid value causes error
Description: ID/searchKey/name of the Price Adjustment (M_OFFER). Resolved by backend via searchKey > id > name > printName.
How it works: transformPromotion() copies discountId → discountRule then resolves it against PriceAdjustment entity to obtain ruleId. *Required after transformation as discountRule.

Description: Total discount amount for the line. Alias for internal field 'amount'.
How it works: transformPromotion() copies totalAmount → amount. Then propagates amount → amt/fullAmt/displayedTotalAmount. *Required after transformation as amount.

Description: Discount amount per unit. Alias for internal field 'unitDiscount'.
How it works: transformPromotion() copies amountPerUnit → unitDiscount. *Required after transformation as unitDiscount.

Description: Number of units affected by the promotion.
How it works: Validated directly (no alias). Propagated to obdiscQtyoffer/qtyOffer/qtyOfferReserved/pendingQtyOffer.

Description: Display name of the promotion.
How it works: transformPromotion() copies name → identifier. Optional; used for display purposes only.

Description: Line description.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.DESCRIPTION via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: EPC code for the line item.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_EPCCODE via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Serial number for the line item.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_SERIALNUMBER via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Sales unit factor.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_SALESUNITFACTOR via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Group description.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS_GROUPDESC via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Amount to pay on delivery.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBRDM_AMTTOPAYINDELIVERY via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Waiting time.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS2_WAITINGTIME via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Print price options.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.EM_OBPOS2_PRINTPRICEOPTIONS via fillBobFromJSON.

Description: Ingredients array as JSON string.
How it works: Preserved via spread. Backend maps it to C_ORDERLINE.INGREDIENTSARRAY via fillBobFromJSON.
